description: 2015 Nigerian gubernatorial elections — stub. State-level results not yet retrieved.
notes: Governorship elections held 2015-04-11 (after presidential on 2015-03-28). APC won majority of states in the north; PDP held south-south and south-east.

gaps.note: State-level results not retrieved. Source: Wikipedia per-state articles or INEC EC8D forms.
